title: ARGENTUM Reputation Dispute — Sybil / Identity Collusion
description: A single operator is accused of controlling multiple ARGENTUM entities that cross-attest to inflate karma without independent verification.
question: Should the suspected sybil cluster be slashed (ruling 1) or cleared (ruling 2)?

descriptions: The dispute lacks sufficient evidence of collusion. No karma is slashed.
The cluster's karma is collapsed to its lowest-karma member; the operator is flagged in the IdentityRegistry.
The entities are independent. The reporter loses their bond.

evidence_expected: Identifier list of the suspected sybil cluster (agent IDs)
Evidence linking entities to a common operator (shared keys, shared infrastructure, behavioral pattern)
Pattern of cross-attestation without independent verification (graph analysis, timing correlations)
